channel.title: The Cohere Blog
channel.description: Enterprise AI research and product updates from Cohere

item.title: Cohere advances sovereign AI capabilities with NVIDIA
item.description: NVIDIA ecosystem-native model and local North instance will meet growing market demand for secure, privately run AI systems

item.title: The advantages of AI in business
item.description: The advantages of AI in business

item.title: Cohere Labs Launches Tiny Aya, Making Multilingual AI Accessible
item.description: Cohere Labs Launches Tiny Aya, Making Multilingual AI Accessible

item.title: Cohere signs world chess champion Magnus Carlsen as brand ambassador
item.description: Carlsen will bring his iconic reputation and strategic thinking to strengthen the company's brand and mission

item.title: Introducing Model Vault: Your private platform for secure and scalable model inference
item.description: Model Vault simplifies serving and scaling Cohere models, so teams can focus on building, not infrastructure.

item.title: How the Cohere Labs open research community turns early-career researchers into global leaders
item.description: Cohere Labs' open research community empowers early-career researchers like Ram Kadiyala and Jebish Purbey to become global leaders in AI research through mentorship, collaboration, and inclusive opportunities.

item.title: How a Community Effort is Teaching AI to See Africa’s Richness
item.description: AfriAya, a vision-language dataset, addresses Africa’s underrepresentation in AI. Created by Ugandan engineers, it builds on Aya improving AI’s recognition of African cultures, covering 13 languages, with plans to expand. Part of Cohere Labs’ inclusion efforts, it aims for cultural robustness in AI.

item.title: Introducing Rerank 4: Cohere’s most powerful reranker yet
item.description: A milestone in search and retrieval, offering unmatched accuracy and speed for enterprise applications.

item.title: Building trust in AI: Cohere’s approach to AI governance
item.description: Cohere’s AI governance frameworks, practices, and policies direct and guide the responsible development and use of our AI models and systems.

item.title: Connect 2025: Why Collaboration is the Ultimate Research Superpower
item.description: Connect 2025: Why Collaboration is the Ultimate Research Superpower

item.title: Cohere expands partnership with SAP to provide Europe sovereign AI solutions
item.description: SAP brings North to its Sovereign Cloud, bringing European enterprises and governments efficient, secure and powerful agentic AI.

item.title: HIPAA Business Associate agreements for custom model development
item.description: We are pleased to offer a HIPAA-compliant Business Associate agreement (BAA) to enable customers across the healthcare industry to work with us to develop secure custom models that meet their specific business needs.

item.title: Making data transfer in LLM systems faster, leaner, and more scalable
item.description: Introducing Shared Memory IPC Caching — a high-performance caching mechanism contributed by Cohere to the vLLM project.

item.title: Securing AI supply chains: Cohere’s commitment to model signing
item.description: Cohere has implemented model signing for all Cohere Command models hosted on Hugging Face to improve integrity and authenticity efforts.

item.title: Announcing the Cohere Partner Program: Boosting enterprise AI
item.description: Today, we are proud to announce the launch of the Cohere Partner Program, a new initiative designed to help our partners innovate faster, expand market impact, and lead the next wave of enterprise AI.

item.title: Cohere adds $100M in second close to latest round as it scales security-first enterprise AI
item.description: Additional funding supports our growing global operations and development of frontier enterprise AI technology.

item.title: Exploring AI in Education
item.description: Using Cohere Grants to transform students into AI builders.

item.title: Cohere opens Paris office as EMEA hub
item.description: Cohere strengthens presence in Paris with additions of VP of EMEA and Head of EMEA Public Policy.

item.title: AI adoption for national security: Modernizing defense
item.description: Second Front’s chief data scientist sees data security and LLM explainability as fundamental to overcoming government caution over AI adoption.

item.title: Command A Translate: Secure translation for global enterprises
item.description: The new industry standard for secure, enterprise-ready machine translation.

item.title: Command A Reasoning: Enterprise-grade control for AI agents
item.description: Securely powering enterprise applications with exceptional reasoning performance, efficiency, and controllability.

item.title: Cohere deepens partnership with Government of Canada
item.description: Cohere and Government of Canada sign Memorandum of Understanding to transform the public sector with sovereign AI.

item.title: Building AI agents that reshape financial services
item.description: Financial teams are unlocking a new era of compliance, efficiency, and customer trust—powered by AI agents.

item.title: Elo ratings beyond arena-style evaluations
item.description: Insights and best practices for using Elo scoring methods for evaluation leaderboards.

item.title: Cohere raises $500M at $6.8B valuation to accelerate enterprise efficiency with agentic AI
item.description: Fresh funding enables Cohere to accelerate its global expansion and build the next generation of secure enterprise and sovereign AI solutions.

item.title: Modernizing FOI systems with AI
item.description: Freedom of information (FOI) request systems need support. The manual, rule-based nature of the process makes them a prime candidate for government AI adoption.

item.title: Introducing North: The next era of enterprise AI
item.description: North enables enterprises that prioritize data security to deploy AI agents and automations at scale within their own infrastructure.

item.title: Introducing Command A Vision: Multimodal AI built for business
item.description: Command A Vision excels across enterprise image understanding tasks while keeping a low compute footprint.

item.title: Navigating the global push for sovereign AI
item.description: Sovereign AI is driving a shift toward secure, locally tailored solutions, redefining global AI innovation and control.

item.title: Cohere and Bell partner to deliver sovereign AI
item.description: Bell Canada and Cohere announced a strategic partnership to provide full-stack sovereign AI solutions for government and enterprise customers across Canada.

item.title: Secure and responsible AI for Europe
item.description: Announcing Cohere’s intention to sign the EU AI Act Code of Practice for General Purpose AI Models.

item.title: Legal work with AI: The DraftWise story
item.description: Transforming legal workflows through innovative and secure AI solutions.

item.title: 코히어, 서울에 APAC 허브 설립 발표
item.description: 새로운 서울 허브를 바탕으로 아시아 태평양 지역으로 확장

item.title: AI benchmarks: A business guide to effective evaluation
item.description: Public AI benchmarks are necessary but far from sufficient. Companies need to build evaluation systems that reflect real-world complexity and business needs.

item.title: Cohere ouvre un bureau à Montréal
item.description: Aujourd'hui, nous étendons notre présence au Canada avec l'ouverture d'un nouveau bureau de Cohere à Montréal.

item.title: The AI advantage: How financial institutions win with AI
item.description: This infographic explores how AI is transforming financial services. Learn about productivity gains, operational efficiencies, and the steps financial leaders are taking to win with AI.

item.title: Security risks in AI supply chains
item.description: A new report by the Coalition for Secure AI details the unfamiliar threats from the data, models, and infrastructure that underpin AI, and how enterprises can tackle them.

item.title: Bringing secure AI to critical systems
item.description: AI security needs to be tightly woven into the solutions that organizations adopt and the way they adopt them, rather than being treated as an add-on.

item.title: Cohere achieves ISO 42001 and ISO 27001 certifications
item.description: Achieving these milestones marks Cohere’s commitment to meet the highest global standards in cybersecurity and responsible AI for our customers.

item.title: Enterprise AI security challenges and solutions
item.description: Empowering enterprises to innovate with confidence in the AI era.

item.title: Cohere partners with Canada and UK Governments on secure AI
item.description: Canada and the UK will leverage Cohere's secure AI technology to enhance government services and national sovereignty.

item.title: Defining AI automation: A new kind of workplace
item.description: Learn how to develop an enterprise AI strategy with our step-by-step template and choose the best AI approach for your company.

item.title: Cohere and Ensemble partner to bring agentic AI to healthcare
item.description: Ensemble will use North by Cohere to enhance healthcare revenue cycle management with secure AI.

item.title: Secure AI: How to safeguard your AI systems
item.description: Learn how to secure your AI systems, identify potential risks, and explore frameworks and best practices to protect your AI models and data.

item.title: Cohere and Second Front bring secure AI to the public sector
item.description: Cohere is partnering with Second Front to deliver secure AI solutions that bolster government services and national security

item.title: AI in finance: Navigating compliance, efficiency, and scale
item.description: Discover how AI can drive innovation, efficiency, and value creation in your financial institution.

item.title: AI customer experience: Shaping engagement with businesses
item.description: Discover how different AI solutions help enhance customer interactions by improving personalization, automation, and proactive services.

item.title: AI agents: Driving productivity at work
item.description: This infographic explores how AI agents boost workplace productivity by automating tasks, improving decision-making, and empowering teams.

item.title: Master agentic AI deployment
item.description: Enable faster agentic AI deployment with secure, customized, and efficient solutions.

item.title: Five ways to modernize manufacturing with AI
item.description: From ensuring compliance to working with legacy systems, here are five ways manufacturers can overcome AI adoption challenges.
